signals.headline: ETH Outpaces BTC for First Time in 2026 on 41% Transaction Surge** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1]
signals.raw:
ETH Outpaces BTC for First Time in 2026 on 41% Transaction Surge** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1]

Ethereum transaction activity jumped 41% week-over-week to 3.6 million daily transactions, outpacing Bitcoin amid aligned ETF flows, spot prices, and on-chain data—marking the first such occurrence this year and signaling capital rotation into the broader ecosystem[1]. ETH price broke $2,400 to $
